metadata.name: ggg
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Ironglen.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Ironglen
towns.description: A hillside town whose cobbled streets wind between stone cottages.

towns.name: Nettlewall
towns.description: A fortified settlement perched on a rocky bluff overlooking the valley.

key_dungeons.name: Twisted Barrow
key_dungeons.description: The air around Twisted Barrow shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Twisted Barrow of evil and secure the Onyx Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.
